title: compute_intrachromosomal_co_v1 — chain action for intrachromosomal_co_karyotype_effect
description: Validates POST /api/actions when type='compute_intrachromosomal_co_karyotype_effect'. Reads a previously-captured chromosome_meiosis_events_v1 envelope (by layer_id, must carry karyotype_at_focal_inv on its rows) and emits a typed intrachromosomal_co_effect_v1 envelope: per-chromosome Welch's t comparing per-dyad CO_per_mb between het and non-het (homA+homB) dyads. The rate-ratio < flag_threshold (default 0.7) is the manuscript intrachromosomal-suppression signal. Promoted from the browser-side `crossovers.js` karyo_strat view.

source_layer_id.description: layer_id of the chromosome_meiosis_events_v1 envelope to test on. Rows must carry karyotype_at_focal_inv for the karyotype split to be meaningful.

flag_threshold.description: rate_ratio_het_over_non_het below this value flags the chromosome as suppressed. Default 0.7 matches the existing `crossovers.js` cell-highlight threshold.
